headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Phillips 66, Raises Price Target to $196
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Erin Wright    maintains Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $180 to $196.
